docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SKILLMAN, RAY W. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JAMISON, WILLIAM DBA BUCHANAN GRILL PARTNERS INC. $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,040.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
